# Auto-generated by modulestrap pattern — safe to customize. Only compile
# lvgldebug sources when it's the selected UI backend. REQUIRES stays
# unconditional in a single top-level idf_component_register() call — see
# meow420/CMakeLists.txt for why (ESP-IDF's component dependency graph is
# built from an early textual scan that doesn't reliably pick up REQUIRES
# split across conditional idf_component_register() calls).
if(CONFIG_PURR_UI_BACKEND_LVGLDEBUG)
    set(LVGLDEBUG_SRCS
        lvgldebug_module.c
        lvgldebug_hal.c
        lvgldebug_screen.c
    )
else()
    set(LVGLDEBUG_SRCS "")
endif()

idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${LVGLDEBUG_SRCS}
    INCLUDE_DIRS
        .
        ../../kernel/core
        ../../kernel/catcalls
        ../../drivers/touch/gt911
    REQUIRES esp_common driver freertos nvs_flash lvgl__lvgl gt911
)
